summary: Completed comprehensive testing of crypto AI trading bot dashboard with live Binance data integration and GPT-5.2 AI analysis. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend dashboard working with minor AI budget limitation.

minor_issues.issue: GPT-5.2 API budget exceeded - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0016135, Max budget: 0.001
minor_issues.impact: AI analysis returns fallback error message instead of insights

passed_tests: GET /api/ returns proper response
GET /api/bot/status returns bot status with running=false initially
POST /api/bot/start starts the bot and returns status started
GET /api/bot/status returns running=true after start
POST /api/bot/stop stops the bot
GET /api/market/price returns live BTC/USDT price data with all required fields
GET /api/market/ohlcv?limit=100 returns OHLCV chart data array with 100 records
GET /api/market/orderbook returns bids, asks, signal, bid_volume, ask_volume
GET /api/market/indicators returns RSI, EMA50, EMA200, ema_crossover values
GET /api/signals/current returns current signal state
GET /api/signals/history returns signal history array
POST /api/ai/analyze triggers GPT-5.2 AI analysis (endpoint works, budget limited)
GET /api/ai/insights returns AI insight history
Frontend dashboard loads with all panels visible
Start/Stop button works and toggles correctly between states
ANALYZE NOW button triggers AI analysis and displays result in terminal
Live price chart displays real BTC/USDT data with proper formatting
Signal display shows current trading signal (BUY/SELL/WAIT)
Indicators panel shows RSI, EMA values and crossover status
Order book displays live bid/ask data with volume pressure
AI terminal shows analysis results and history
Trade history log displays signal records
action_item_for_main_agent: Increase GPT-5.2 API budget limit in EMERGENT_LLM_KEY account or implement budget management to prevent AI analysis failures. Current budget: 0.001, needed: >0.002 for continuous operation.
